narratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन के हमलों में अपनी जमीन गंवाने के बाद भी रूस ने अपना कड़ा रुख नहीं बदला है।
narratives.reasoning: This quote frames Russia's continued aggression as a sign of steadfastness and resolve ('कड़ा रुख'), portraying its military posture in a positive, commendable light despite setbacks.

narratives.evidence_quote: इन हमलों ने रूस का मनोबल तोड़ने की जगह उसे और भी ज्यादा हमलावर बना दिया है।
narratives.reasoning: The statement positively highlights Russia's resilience and increased aggressiveness as a response to Ukrainian attacks, presenting it as strengthened and more determined, which aligns with praising Russia's military character.

narratives.evidence_quote: रूस की सेना ने लगातार अपने कब्जे वाले क्षेत्रों पर मजबूत पकड़ बनाते हुए यूक्रेन की सेना को पीछे खदेड़ने का काम किया है।
narratives.reasoning: This directly praises the effectiveness and strength of the Russian army, highlighting its successful actions in consolidating control and pushing back Ukrainian forces.

narratives.evidence_quote: लेकिन यूक्रेन के इस हमले में रूसी सेनाओं ने रूस को और भी ज्यादा हमलावर बनाया है।
narratives.reasoning: This statement undermines the effectiveness of Ukraine's military action by suggesting it backfired, serving only to make Russia more aggressive, thereby discrediting Ukraine's strategic success.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Praise of Russia: Praise of Russian military might
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस की सेना ने लगातार अपने कब्जे वाले क्षेत्रों पर मजबूत पकड़ बनाते हुए यूक्रेन की सेना को पीछे खदेड़ने का काम किया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement directly praises the effectiveness and strength of the Russian military in holding territory and pushing back Ukrainian forces, aligning with the definition of highlighting Russia's military institutions and scale positively.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Praise of Russia: Russian invasion has strong national support
subnarratives.evidence_quote: इन हमलों ने रूस का मनोबल तोड़ने की जगह उसे और भी ज्यादा हमलावर बना दिया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote suggests that Ukrainian attacks have not broken Russian morale but have instead made Russia more aggressive, implying a resilient and supportive national spirit behind the invasion effort.

subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly praises the effectiveness and strength of the Russian military, highlighting its ability to maintain control and push back the Ukrainian army, which aligns with the definition of praising Russia's military institutions and scale.

subnarratives.reasoning: This statement frames the Russian response as one of increased resolve and aggression, implying a unified and resilient national spirit in the face of attacks, which supports the narrative of strong internal support for the invasion.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Discrediting Ukrainian military
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन के हमलों में अपनी जमीन गंवाने के बाद भी रूस ने अपना कड़ा रुख नहीं बदला है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote frames Ukrainian military actions (attacks) as ineffective, stating that despite them, Russia has not changed its stance, implying the Ukrainian military's efforts are futile and failing to achieve strategic objectives.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Situation in Ukraine is hopeless
subnarratives.evidence_quote: लेकिन इन हमलों ने रूस का मनोबल तोड़ने की जगह उसे और भी ज्यादा हमलावर बना दिया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement directly portrays Ukrainian military actions as counterproductive, strengthening the enemy (Russia) instead of weakening it, which supports the narrative that Ukraine's situation is hopeless and its actions lead to negative outcomes.
